name: Orb Usage-Based Billing API
what_it_does: Usage-based billing platform with REST API for implementing complex metering and billing logic — supporting consumption-based, seat-based, hybrid, and custom pricing models with real-time event ingestion and accurate invoice generation.
use_cases: Ingesting usage events (API calls, compute minutes, data processed) for accurate billing
Creating and managing customer subscriptions with complex usage-based pricing plans
Querying real-time usage data and cost estimates for customer-facing dashboards
Building billing workflows that calculate and invoice based on arbitrary usage metrics
Implementing prepaid credits and drawdown billing for consumption-based products
not_for: Simple flat-rate or per-seat billing without usage complexity (use Stripe Billing directly)
Small products that don't need metering infrastructure
Real-time pricing without downstream invoice generation
best_when: A developer platform or SaaS product needs sophisticated usage-based billing with complex pricing logic, accurate metering, and API-driven plan management.
avoid_when: Your billing is simple flat-rate or per-seat without usage complexity — Stripe Billing handles that directly.

auth.notes: API key from Orb dashboard as Bearer token. Separate test and production keys. Account-scoped access. Webhook signatures for secure event delivery. No OAuth — simple key-based auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; sandbox available for testing
pricing.paid_tiers: Percentage of billing volume processed; typically 0.5-1% + flat monthly fee
pricing.notes: Revenue-share pricing model aligns incentives. Competes directly with Metronome and Amberflo. Strong developer experience and documentation. YC W21. Trusted by AI companies with complex metering needs.

performance.rate_limits: High rate limits for event ingestion; plan-based for management API

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Excellent API documentation with detailed billing model explanations. Multi-language SDKs. Webhook support for invoice and subscription events. Strong error messages with billing-specific context.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Event ingestion idempotent with idempotency key. Subscription management operations idempotent. Usage queries always return consistent results. Invoice calculations deterministic from event data.
known_agent_gotchas: Complex pricing plan configuration requires understanding Orb's pricing model concepts
Event ingestion uses different endpoint than management API — separate authentication contexts
Invoice finalization is automatic — agents must understand invoice lifecycle states
Revenue-share pricing means billing costs scale with product success

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token auth with test/production key separation. SOC2 Type II certified. Webhook signature verification. Financial data handling with bank-grade security practices.
